news.title: ASCO, Ryght AI team up for breast cancer trial site selection

news.title: Agios signs $165M deal for blood disorder drug from Korea’s Oscotec that flunked phase 2 study
news.snippet: Days after its lead clinical-stage asset suffered a setback, Agios Pharmaceuticals has rebounded by buying a blood disorder drug that flunked a phase 2 study.

news.title: Rallybio swerves past Candid pothole to land deal with cancer drug developer Avenzo
news.snippet: Rallybio has steered its way to a new reverse merger, inking a deal with Avenzo Therapeutics weeks after a UCB buyout took its former partner off the market.

news.title: Servier inks $2.6B buyout of Edgewise’s muscular dystrophy unit to beef up neurology pipeline
news.snippet: Servier has struck a deal to buy Edgewise Therapeutics’ muscular dystrophy business for $1.55 billion upfront, gaining control of a program that is on course to deliver pivotal data this year.

news.title: Lilly locks in 5-program R&D pact with China’s Haisco worth up to $3B, but targets unclear
news.snippet: Within hours of securing a gastrointestinal drug from Korea’s Hanmi Pharma, Eli Lilly has ramped up the biobucks for a wider-ranging pact with China’s Haisco Pharmaceutical.

news.title: Lilly pens $1.2B deal for Hanmi’s GLP-2 drug being aimed at short bowel syndrome
news.snippet: Eli Lilly has expanded its glucagon-like peptide portfolio in an intriguing direction by licensing a phase 2-stage GLP-2 agonist from Hanmi Pharm.

news.title: ASCO: Gilead touts ADC ovarian cancer data as proof Tubulis buyout was ‘a good deal’
news.snippet: The German biotech shared updated data from a phase 1 study of the antibody-drug conjugate TUB-040, the star behind Gilead’s decision to buy the company for $3.15 billion upfront earlier this year.

news.title: ASCO: AstraZeneca's Imfinzi, Imjudo duo shines in earlier-stage liver cancer

news.title: ASCO: Lilly ties Retevmo to ‘dramatic’ outcomes in early-stage lung cancer with rare RET biomarker

news.title: MannKind seeks long-awaited sales boost with inhaled insulin approval for kids
news.snippet: With a pediatric approval in hand for Afrezza, MannKind may finally have the boost it needs to make an impact in the market after struggling for more than a decade with the inhaled insulin powder.

news.title: STAT+: Eli Lilly warns hospitals to submit claims data in the next five days or lose their 340B drug discounts
news.snippet: Eli Lilly has told more than 1,000 hospitals participating in the 340B drug discount program to submit claims data over the next five days — or lose price breaks.

news.snippet: With no licensed vaccines available to protect against the Ebola virus currently spreading in the Congo, efforts are underway to fast-track development of at least three vaccines.

news.title: Prostate cancer screening only for 'a few thousand' high risk men

news.title: Ebola risk raised to 'very high' in DR Congo
